4047.issue: [S4047] Adapter "unraid" is not yet available in the stable repository. Please consider adding it.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#80] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/ingel81/ioBroker.unraid/issues/80)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ingel81/ioBroker.unraid/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/ingel81/ioBroker.unraid/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.

0069.issue: [W0069] The following dependencies require a node.js version incompatible with the adapter's minimum (node 22): undici (requires node: ">=22.19.0"). Please increase the engines.node requirement at [package.json](https://github.com/ingel81/ioBroker.unraid/blob/master/package.json) or update/replace the incompatible dependencies.
